title: Amrita Bindu Upanishad: The Drop of Nectar
description: From the Amrita Bindu Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Amrita Bindu Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: The mind alone is the cause of bondage and liberation. Bound by objects, it is bondage. Free of objects, it is liberation. Therefore, the one who seeks liberation should make the mind free of objects.
